case_title: ALLIANCE INVIRONMENTAL GROUP VS. PATRICK SHANNON

docket_entries.description: ORDER (SC-105A)"DEFENDANT'S REQUEST WILL BE TREATED AS A VENUE CHALLENGE, AND WILL BE CONSIDERED AT THE TIME CURRENTLY SET FOR TRIAL", PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. HEARING DATE SET ON APRIL 5, 2010. COPY MAILED TO PARTIES.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLIANCE ENVIRONMENTAL GROUP
PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT PATRICK SHANNON, FILED. SERVED ON MARCH 8, 2010 BY PERSONAL SERVICE. ONE PROOF OF SERVICE IS ALREADY ON FILE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALLIANCE ENVIRONMENTAL GROUP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHANNON, PATRICK $1,850.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,955.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT SHANNON, PATRICK HEARING SET FOR JUN-09-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SMALL CLAIMS SUBPOENA, FILED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-08-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SHANNON, PATRICK
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,850.00 FILED BY ALLIANCE ENVIRONMENTAL GROUP AS TO DEFENDANT SHANNON, PATRICK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-05-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-05-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506) NOTICE REGARDING FEES MAILED TO PLAINTIFF WITH A COPY OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT.
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO RAMONA BOSTIC/COLLECTION OFFICER, ALLIANCE ENVIRONMENTAL GROUP,990 W. TENTH ST. AZUSA,CA 91702

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PATRICK SHANNON IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE, AT REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SC-105: REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER & ANSWER FILED, BY DEFT.
DEFENDANT'S CORRESPONDENCE ADDRESSED TO THE COMMISSIONER IN SUPPORT OF HIS MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT, FILED.
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLIANCE ENVIRONMENTAL GROUP

documents.description: ORDER (SC-105A)"DEFENDANT'S REQUEST WILL BE TREATED AS A VENUE CHALLENGE, AND WILL BE CONSIDERED AT THE TIME CURRENTLY SET FOR TRIAL", PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. HEARING DATE SET ON APRIL 5, 2010. COPY MAILED TO PARTIES.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PATRICK SHANNON IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE, AT REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
